title: obione arenaria
intro: Obione arenaria, also known as sea pink or sand spurry, is a low-growing, perennial succulent plant that thrives in coastal areas with sandy soils. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and minor infections. The health benefits of Obione arenaria include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and protecting against microbial infections. The plant is often prepared as a tea, tincture, or ointment for its medicinal uses.
